opponents.label: Hatchling — Gen 0, shallow
opponents.blurb: Generation 0's best genome (42% vs baseline), looking just one move ahead. Beatable.

opponents.label: Fledgling — Gen 0, deeper
opponents.blurb: The same early genome, but now thinking two plies ahead.

opponents.blurb: The champion at full default depth.

opponents.label: Champion — deep
opponents.blurb: The fully evolved champion (71% vs baseline, from g3-3), thinking hard.
